name: goals-refactor
goal: Migrate goals from single quarter.md to individual files with frontmatter. Update parser, backend, context service, and all 6 skills.

userStories.title: Create Migration Script
userStories.description: Add migration to `arete update` that converts `quarter.md` → individual goal files. Detect all 3 legacy formats, create individual files with frontmatter, rename original to backup.
acceptanceCriteria: Migration detects all 3 legacy formats: `## Goal N: Title`, `### [Qn-N] Title`, `### Qn-N Title`
Frontmatter includes: id, title, status: active, quarter, type: outcome, orgAlignment, successCriteria
Outputs: 'Migrated N goals to individual files. Backup saved to .quarter.md.backup'
Idempotent: If individual files exist, skips migration
Test: Migration fixture for each format variant

userStories.title: Add Goal Type
userStories.description: Add `Goal` type to entities.ts for individual goal files.
acceptanceCriteria: Fields: id (string), slug (string), title (string), status ('active' | 'complete' | 'deferred'), quarter (string), type ('outcome' | 'milestone'), orgAlignment (string), successCriteria (string), filePath (string)

userStories.title: Create Goal Parser Service
userStories.description: Create goal parser that reads individual files and falls back to legacy format.
acceptanceCriteria: `parseGoals(goalsDir: string, storage: StorageAdapter): Promise<Goal[]>` — main entry point
`parseLegacyQuarterFile()`: Handle all 3 legacy formats, return Goal[]
Fallback: If no individual files found, try legacy format
Unit tests for: new format, each legacy format, empty dir, malformed files

userStories.title: Update Backend Goals Route
userStories.description: Use goal-parser service instead of inline parsing. Maintain API response shape.
acceptanceCriteria: `/api/goals/quarter` returns exact same shape: `{ outcomes: QuarterOutcome[], quarter: string, found: boolean }`
Add `/api/goals/list` endpoint returning `Goal[]` with full metadata
Fix existing test failures (format mismatch documented in LEARNINGS.md)
Add integration test with real filesystem (temp dir)
Test: Response shape assertion for backward compat

userStories.title: Update CLI Seed
userStories.description: Scaffold new goal structure for new workspaces.
acceptanceCriteria: Create individual goal files instead of `quarter.md`

userStories.title: Update Context Service
userStories.description: Include individual goal files in context injection.
acceptanceCriteria: Fallback: Include `goals/quarter.md` if no individual files found

userStories.title: Update Quarter-Plan Skill
userStories.description: Write individual goal files instead of single quarter.md.
acceptanceCriteria: Update template for individual file format
Document: 'Individual files created for each outcome'

userStories.title: Update Goals-Alignment Skill
userStories.description: Read individual goal files for alignment view.
acceptanceCriteria: Graceful fallback: If no individual files, read `quarter.md`

userStories.title: Update Week-Plan and Daily-Plan Skills
userStories.description: Read goals from individual files for context.
acceptanceCriteria: Link priorities to goal slugs (e.g., `Advances: Q1-2`)
Graceful fallback: If no individual files, read `quarter.md`

userStories.title: Update Week-Review and Prepare-Meeting-Agenda Skills
acceptanceCriteria: Read individual goal files for context

userStories.title: Migration Guide and Changelog
acceptanceCriteria: Update `arete update` output to show migration status
Add migration instructions to user workspace (if applicable)
Update AGENTS.md if skill triggers change
Add memory entry for goals refactor
